title: Analysis of submarine landsliding in the rupture area of the 27 February 2010 Maule earthquake, Central Chile
abstract: Comparison of bathymetric datasets compiled before and after the 2010 Mw 8.8 Maule earthquake offshore Central Chile proves that no new submarine landslides on a size scale detectable with hull-mounted bathymetric echosounders (features >1 km horizontal size) formed as a direct consequence of the ground shaking. Gravity coring around a pre-existing slide feature offshore Concepción documents retrogressive failures triggered by aftershocks.

location.description: Offshore central Chile ~36°–38°S, Maule earthquake rupture zone; submarine landslide analysis using repeat bathymetry

seismic_lines.name: Pre-earthquake MCS and post-earthquake survey profiles — Maule offshore

data.name: Pre/Post Maule Earthquake Comparative Bathymetry — Central Chile 36°–38°S
data.description: Pre-earthquake (legacy GEOMAR) and post-earthquake (R/V SONNE SO210, 2010) multibeam bathymetry compared to detect submarine landslides from 2010 Maule earthquake. [SO210 cruise datasets searchable on PANGAEA]

data.name: Parasound Sub-Bottom Profiles — Maule Earthquake Zone
data.description: Parasound sub-bottom profiler data acquired post-Maule earthquake to image shallow stratigraphy around slide features

data.name: Legacy MCS Profiles — Maule Rupture Zone
data.description: Pre-earthquake seismic reflection data from the Maule rupture zone used to characterize pre-existing slide features

_data_note: Post-Maule earthquake survey (R/V SONNE SO210, 2010). Comparative bathymetry study. Primarily bathymetry and subbottom; MCS secondary.

processing.summary: Pre- and post-earthquake multibeam bathymetric datasets offshore central Chile (36°–38°S) were compared to assess submarine landsliding from the 2010 Maule earthquake. Parasound sub-bottom profiler data and gravity cores from the post-earthquake R/V SONNE SO210 cruise supplement the bathymetric comparison. No new large-scale MCS seismic survey conducted; study focuses on comparative bathymetry.
workflow: 1. Pre-earthquake bathymetry gridding from legacy GEOMAR cruises
5. Core description and correlation with seismic features
processing.notes: Primarily bathymetric study; seismic role is secondary context

analysis_notes: Validated against PDF. author: 'Scholz Felipe' → 'Scholz Florian' (confirmed from title page). vessel: 'R/V SONNE' → R/V Melville MV1004 SIOSEARCH (NSF/Scripps rapid response, weeks after earthquake) + R/V SONNE SO210 (Sep-Nov 2010, IFM-GEOMAR). Pre-earthquake bathymetry from legacy IFM-GEOMAR cruises. BioBio Slide offshore Concepción is the main focus area.
